code:
import io
import string
import list

fn byte_at_or_zero(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn get_or_zero(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match xs.get(i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
end

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)

mut starts: List<Int> = []
mut stops: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
mut in_tok = false
while i < n
  let b = byte_at_or_zero(input, i)
  let ws = is_ws(b)
  if in_tok
    if ws
      stops = list.push(stops, i)
      in_tok = false
    end
  else
    if not ws
      starts = list.push(starts, i)
      in_tok = true
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if in_tok
  stops = list.push(stops, n)
end

let count = starts.len()
mut best_count = 0
mut best_idx = 0
mut k = 0
while k < count
  let a = get_or_zero(starts, k)
  let b = get_or_zero(stops, k)
  let tok = string.substring(input, a, b)
  mut cnt = 0
  mut j = 0
  while j < count
    let aj = get_or_zero(starts, j)
    let bj = get_or_zero(stops, j)
    let tok2 = string.substring(input, aj, bj)
    if tok == tok2
      cnt = cnt + 1
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  if cnt > best_count
    best_count = cnt
    best_idx = k
  end
  k = k + 1
end

if count == 0
  println("top==0")
else
  let a = get_or_zero(starts, best_idx)
  let b = get_or_zero(stops, best_idx)
  let tok = string.substring(input, a, b)
  println("top=#{tok}=#{best_count}")
end
